summary.intent: Fix and resolve PR review comments on PR #665 (branch spurious-idea) for the moltis repo, addressing CI failures and inline reviewer feedback.
summary.outcome: Applied a style fix to setup-required.html (provider-btn-secondary CSS class usage), committed the change, and pushed to origin to satisfy CI and reviewer comments.

repo: CSS component classes are defined in crates/web/src/assets/css/components.css
There is a local-validate.sh script used to run local/* CI gates before pushing

code.finding: Button styling uses the provider-btn-secondary CSS class; incorrect class usage was flagged in PR review and fixed here
provider-btn-secondary class is defined in components.css; needed to verify the correct class name before applying the fix

workflow: PR comments and CI failures were triaged together in one pass before committing fixes
Biome is used for linting/formatting checks as part of the CI pipeline
local-validate.sh is the mechanism to run local CI gates that mirror remote checks

friction: CI failed and required log inspection to diagnose the root cause before fixing
Had to look up the correct CSS class name in components.css before editing the template — class name was not immediately obvious
